hero.title: Barcode Scanners & POS, Built for Real Retail -- and Real Buyers.
hero.description: Ibocode (Guangzhou Ibocode Electronic Technology Co., Ltd.) is a factory-direct manufacturer of barcode scanners, thermal printers, cash drawers, and POS machines. For over 10 years, we have helped wholesalers, brand owners, retailers, software integrators, and hardware distributors launch reliable hardware that earns repeat orders -- not return tickets.
hero.buyerRealityText: If you have ever been burned by inconsistent read rates, unclear specs, or last-minute delays, you are not alone.
hero.supportText: B2B buyers worldwide need three things: predictable read performance, compliance-ready planning, and communication that does not waste time. That is exactly what our operation is built to deliver.

featuredProducts.title: Featured Product Categories
featuredProducts.description: We focus on barcode scanning, printing, and POS hardware that sells fast because it solves everyday retail and industrial problems.

items.title: Handheld Barcode Scanners
items.description: Wired, wireless, and Bluetooth 2D imagers for fast, accurate 1D/2D reading.

items.title: Desktop & Platform Scanners
items.description: Omni-directional and mountable scanners for hands-free retail checkout.

items.title: Thermal Receipt Printers
items.description: 2"/3" receipt printers with stable media feeding and long printhead life.

items.title: Thermal Label Printers
items.description: 3"/4" label printers built for high-volume shipping and retail labeling.

items.title: POS Machines & Cash Drawers
items.description: Integrated POS terminals and durable cash drawers for complete checkout.

items.title: Card Readers & Portable Scanners
items.description: Portable readers and card readers that drop into any workflow.

problems.title: The Problems We Remove
problems.description: If you have dealt with inconsistent read rates or slow feedback, our process is designed to make each run feel repeatable and predictable.

items.title: Inconsistent batches
items.description: Process checkpoints protect batch consistency, so the product you approve is the product your customers receive.

items.title: Unclear specs
items.description: Buyer-first execution means clear specs, clear revisions, and clear next steps without guesswork.

items.title: Last-minute delays
items.description: Fast response culture and launch support keep packaging, labeling, and timelines on track.

whyChoose.title: Your Reliable Partner for Barcode Scanners, Printers & POS
whyChoose.description: Built for buyers who need scale, repeatability, and faster market response without sacrificing margin or supply stability.

cards.title: 01. Unbeatable Pricing
cards.subtitle: Factory Direct + Scale
cards.description: By combining factory-direct production with strong volume purchasing on scan engines and components, we keep costs competitive. Partnering with us means bypassing middlemen and directly sharing the dividends of our scale.

cards.title: 02. Robust Inventory & Rapid Fulfillment
cards.subtitle: Ready to ship
cards.description: With permanent inventory of popular scanner and printer models, we support fast dispatch. For international buyers, this shortens procurement cycles, improves capital turnover, and reduces the risk of stockouts.

cards.title: 03. Market-Proven Product DNA
cards.subtitle: Best-sellers with evidence
cards.description: Our handheld and platform scanners are long-standing sellers across retail and industrial use. Their designs and durability are already field-tested by daily users, helping you sell products buyers actually want.

cards.title: 04. High Flexibility & Partnership Growth
cards.subtitle: Built for international collaboration
cards.description: As an active partner in the international market, we value every client. We offer flexible MOQs and rapid response times, working closely with you to explore and grow your local market together.

glance.title: Why Choose Us? At a Glance

items.benefit: Maximum profit margins for your business.
Zero stock pressure and faster cash flow.
Agile response to your specific market needs.

audience.title: For Whom We Build
audience.description: Whether you sell through Amazon, regional retail, POS distributors, or system-integration channels, the expectations are the same: the product must read right, feel right, and work reliably every time.

items.title: Wholesalers and importers
items.description: Need stable replenishment and export-ready packaging.

items.title: Brand owners
items.description: Building private-label scanner and printer programs with differentiated designs.

items.title: Retailers
items.description: Demanding consistent appearance and fewer complaints.

items.title: E-commerce sellers
items.description: Who live and die by reviews and return rates.

items.title: System integrators & ISVs
items.description: Need stable hardware that integrates with POS, ERP, and warehouse systems.

highlight.title: Factory strength you can show your team
items: 10+ years in barcode scanner and POS manufacturing
In-house R&D, QC, sales & after-sales teams
OEM/ODM: design, prototyping, 100% aging test, mass production, delivery

pilotToScale.title: Pilot to Scale, Without Quality Surprises
pilotToScale.description: Cheap is expensive when returns start coming in. We help you validate early and unlock better pricing as volumes grow.

cards.title: Pilot order
cards.description: Start with a pilot order to verify read performance, ergonomics, and market response.

cards.title: Revision control
cards.description: Lock specs and revisions after validation to protect repeat orders.

cards.title: Tiered pricing for scale
cards.description: Unlock better pricing as volumes grow, without cutting reliability.

compliance.title: Compliance-ready planning (for EU and US buyers)
compliance.description: If you sell under your own brand, your business may be treated as the manufacturer for certain market requirements. We align documentation and labeling planning early.

cards.title: EU RoHS and CE
cards.description: Documentation pathways restricting hazardous substances and indicating conformity.

cards.title: US FCC pathways
cards.description: Support for Certification and Supplier Declaration of Conformity depending on product type.

cards.title: ISO 9001 aligned
cards.description: Quality management system support for vendor onboarding requirements.

compliance.note: We align documentation and labeling planning based on destination market and product configuration.

ordering.title: A Simple, Supplier-Friendly Process
ordering.description: Streamlined for global buyers who need clear steps, reliable timing, and transparent follow-through.
ordering.proTip: Pro Tip: Include MOQ, target deadline, and artwork status in your RFQ to help us return a faster, comparable quotation.
